sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n102942" key="*teleniki/zw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Τελενῑκίζω</orth>, <sense id="n102942.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">make empty</tr_>, coined by <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cratin.</author> </bibl> (<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0434.tlg001:217" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">217</biblScope> </bibl>) from <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Τελένικος</foreign>, the name of a poor man otherwise unknown: hence <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Τελενίκειος</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ἠχώ</foreign> an <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">empty</tr_> sound, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phot.</author></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
